hero_desc: The largest pickleball facility in Orange County. 43 dedicated and 16 hybrid courts — all with new stadium lighting for evening play.
programs_subtitle: From complete beginners to competitive advanced players — we have a program designed for your game.

programs.title: Intro to Pickleball
programs.text: New to the sport? Our intro clinics teach you the basics — rules, scoring, and fundamental techniques in a friendly, welcoming environment.

programs.title: Skill Development Clinics
programs.text: Improve your dinking, third-shot drops, and court movement. Group clinics with certified pros designed to take your game to the next level.

programs.title: Competitive Training
programs.text: Intensive training for 4.0+ players. Strategy, pattern plays, drilling, and tournament preparation with our top coaching staff.

programs.title: Youth Pickleball Academy
programs.text: Structured youth programs designed to build confidence and skills in players ages 8–17. Fun, competitive, and educational.

programs.title: Leagues & Ladders
programs.text: Join organized round-robin leagues and ladder competitions. Meet other players, track your progress, and compete regularly.

programs.title: Open Play & Drop-in
programs.text: Jump in any time! Open play is available daily for members. Use Team Reach to coordinate games with other Los Cab players.

courts_title: The Premier Pickleball Facility in Orange County
courts_subtitle: With 59 total courts — more than any other club in OC — Los Cab is the destination for serious pickleball players.

courts_features.title: New Stadium Lighting
courts_features.desc: All 59 courts feature brand-new lighting systems for perfect visibility during evening sessions.

courts_features.title: Dedicated Pickleball Courts
courts_features.desc: 43 courts built exclusively for pickleball — optimal court dimensions, surfacing, and net heights.

courts_features.title: Hybrid Courts
courts_features.desc: 16 additional courts convertible for both tennis and pickleball — maximizing your court availability.

courts_features.title: Team Reach Integration
courts_features.desc: Connect with other members via Team Reach to organize games, track scores, and join group sessions.

membership_text: $200 initiation fee. Includes unlimited court access, open play, discounted clinics, and all Sports Membership benefits.
cta_text: Join Los Cab's pickleball community — the largest in Orange County — and start playing today.
